Incoming service run: หลักดินแท่งเหล็กทองแดงบอนด์ (ground rod, ø14.2mm, ยาว 2.40m), 1-10 IEC 01-20mm.PVC ground conductor to the LP panel area, 2-10 IEC 01 ø25mm.uPVC exterior exposed run (นอกอาคารเดินลอย) labeled 'TO kWH METER' at the bottom-left of the sheet, and a separate 2-2.5 NYY-ø25mm.PVC run down through จอดรถ to a weatherproof bell switch (SB, +1.50M) at the bottom edge of the plan

sibling_files: บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า47_ac_notes.json
warnings: GRID CONFIRMATION: the printed dimension chain on this page is identical to หน้า46 (3.20x3=9.60 horizontal; 4.00+2.00+3.60+1.80+3.15=14.55 vertical) and matches the building grid master exactly.

No boxed/waterproof-cover (⊟) outlet symbol was observed drawn anywhere on this sheet -- all outlets, including those in ซักล้าง and ห้องครัว (wet areas), use the plain ⊖ symbol defined in the EE-01 legend. Flagged for cross-check since a waterproof variant would be expected in a laundry/kitchen area.

The 2-3 outlet cluster at the ซักล้าง/ห้องครัว corner is the least certain count on this sheet -- the circles overlap tightly enough in the source image that an exact count of 2 vs 3 units could not be fully resolved even after a 6x zoom crop; treated as 2 (best-effort), not a verified quantity.

The 'B' door-chime symbol identification carries the same uncertainty noted on the EE-03 lighting-plan sibling file -- it is not explicitly labeled 'bell'/'กริ่ง' in printed text on this sheet, only inferred from its glyph shape (small box with a bell/wedge icon on top) matching the EE-01 legend's 'bell icon' entry most closely among the 10 defined symbols.
This sheet also contains a telephone/TV/AC-circuit notes column on its right side, captured in the sibling file.
